updates.title: Income-tax return forms released: Here's all you need to know about ITR-1 Sahaj — Top FAQs answered
updates.summary: The Income-Tax department has released ITR forms for AY27/FY26, enabling offline preparation via Excel Utility for ITR-1 and ITR-4. Taxpayers can file returns online through the official portal, with a deadline for individual filings set for 31 July 2026.

updates.title: Fixed Deposits: Can you save tax on FD interest? Key rules every depositor should know
updates.summary: Interest earned on fixed deposits is treated as ‘Income from Other Sources’ under income tax rules. It gets added to your total annual income and taxed according to the income tax slab applicable to you.
updates.user_impact: May affect your tax liability or filing process
updates.content_angle: Educational explainer on this taxation development
